pi_items.source: install_gvsig.sh Natural Earth download target and export_result.sh REF_SHP
verifier.py checks for ISO_A3/ADM0_A3 == 'ISL' to locate Iceland from Natural Earth dataset
task.json prompt instructions and verifier.py field value check
task.json prompt instructions and verifier.py field name check

privileged_info_summary: The agent must create an output shapefile at `/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/iceland_boundary.shp` based on the Natural Earth countries dataset (`/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp`). The output shapefile must contain a polygon covering at least 80% (0.8 coverage ratio) of Iceland (`ISL` in reference data). The new polygon must have an attribute named `region_id` with the value `ISL-Zone-01`.
